texto: We are each on our own journey. Each of us is on our very own adventure; encountering all kinds of challenges, and the choices we make on that adventure will shape us as we go; these choices will stretch us, test us and push us to our limit; and our adventure will make us stronger then we ever know we could be.
explicacao: Citação de Aamnah Akram sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “We are each on our own journey. Each of us is on our very own adventure; encountering all kinds o…” articula reflexao, adventure, challenges em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como viagem e challenges.
